extortion.description: Abramson Brown & Dugan is a leading law firm in New Hampshire specializing in medical malpractice and personal injury cases. With a reputation for securing the highest number of settlements in the state, they cater to clients who have suffered injuries due to medical negligence or accidents. Their team of experienced attorneys is committed to providing compassionate support during what can be a traumatic time for their clients. The firm also emphasizes their mission to restore trust and advocate fiercely for those affected by serious legal matters. Employees: 20 Revenue: $5 Million Industry: Law Firms & Legal Services  Phone Number: (603) 627-1819
